title: Denki's Music Discs
description: Adds 12 new music discs by Denki.
body:
Adds 12 music discs made by DENKI and co.

*Forge/NeoForge only. Fabric and datapack version is coming soon.*

**SoundCloud link: https://soundcloud.com/ho0ho10m0svc**

## How to obtain

A music disc is dropped by killing a goat. It has a 50% of dropping a disc and is not affected by Looting enchantment

## List of discs:

#### By DENKI/J4ponīka:
- PORSCHE BOY
- BREAKHERBACK
- ✟ DEATH-CYCLE ✟ (デス•サイクル)
- Show Me What You Got (SMWYGC Track 1)
- Thing Called Love [Prod: Heydium]
- Bone fracture
- *DENKI x EDY* - MOVE
- under the flowers (prod. neverforever)
- THINKER
- Band-Aid *(as J4ponīka)*
#### By IRISH CAR BOMB ft. DENKI:
- CLICK! CLICK! [ 心に槍を] [w/ DENKI, RIRI] [prod. @flamingo]
- U MAKE ME WEAR SKIRTS! (w/ denki)

Credits to DENKI and others listed for allowing their musics to be added as a mod. Built with [MCreator](https://mcreator.net)
